steps.title: Find b using the point (-24, 0)
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(-24, 0)$, so $f(-24) = a\sqrt{-24+b} = 0$. Since $f(24) \lt 0$ (not zero), we cannot have $a = 0$. Therefore $\sqrt{-24+b} = 0$, which gives us:
$$b = 24$$

steps.title: Find the sign of a using f(24) < 0
steps.content:
With $b = 24$, we get $f(24) = a\sqrt{48}$. Since $\sqrt{48} = 4\sqrt{3}$, we have $f(24) = a \cdot 4\sqrt{3}$. The factor $4\sqrt{3} > 0$, but $f(24) \lt 0$, so:
$$a \lt 0$$

steps.title: Compare a and b to determine the answer
steps.content:
We established that $a \lt 0$ and $b = 24$. Therefore:
$$a \lt 0 \lt 24 = b$$
which means $a \lt b$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
